title: Tium wilsonii
taxonomy: Tium wilsonii is classified under the family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This classification places Tium wilsonii within the order Lamiales, along with other flowering plants such as mint and snapdragons. The genus Tium is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical Africa, and Tium wilsonii is a specific species within this genus. The classification of Tium wilsonii is based on its physical characteristics, including its leaves, flowers, and growth habit. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of Tium wilsonii.
